text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That wasn't too bad, but it's a shame I didn't get
first...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: What did you think of the race, Trainer?
choice_data_list: I think your training is paying off!
I think your training is paying off!
There's still plenty of room for improvement.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: What did you think of the race, Trainer?
choice_data_list: I think your training is paying off!
I think your training is paying off!
There's still plenty of room for improvement.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hm. So it wasn't the best, but it shows I'm
improving?
choice_data_list:
Right. If we keep up this momentum, we can win
next time.

Right. If we keep up this momentum, we can win
next time.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
They do say that failure provides an opportunity
to learn... Okay, I see. So you're looking at all this
from a broader perspective.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I knew you were the right person to train me. I
feel like I can count on you to make me much
stronger!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Right! ♪ In celebration of our achievement, I
hereby present you with a clover of appreciation
and gratitude!
choice_data_list: Huh? You've got a clover on you now?
Huh? You've got a clover on you now?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to go find one! ♪ Would you like to join
me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We search the parks on the way home for a
four-leaf clover, and Fine Motion ends up giving
me the prettiest one she finds.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I bet you've noticed even more areas I can
improve on than I have...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And what an excellent trainer you are! Would you
mind explaining how I might improve?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'll take everything you say onboard, so please be
as strict as you want. Let's start the breakdown
right away.
choice_data_list: The, let's start with the early-race pacing...
The, let's start with the early-race pacing...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. It's just like my father said. The people most
worthy of trust and respect are those willing to give
honest criticism...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion whispers those words to herself as
she faces the review session with a resolute look
in her eye.
